message:
test(tx): enable and update proptest idempotency/resume suite

Switch from dead __journal_types_placeholder gate to subprocess-bridge
feature. Align with evolved plan.rs API: rename TxIdempotencyCheckResult
to TxIdempotencyCheck, Fresh to FirstExecution, add description field
to TxStep, use serde_json::to_value for receipts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
